answer:
{"tool": "python_exec", "arguments": {
    "code": "import math, sympy as sp\n"\
           "a, b = 1, 1 # hypotenuse and one leg of isosceles right triangle\n"\
           "c = 2 * a # other leg of isosceles right triangle\n"\
           "d = a * sqrt(2) # point D\n"\
           "m = c / 2 # point M\n"\
           "n = (a * (1 + sqrt(2)) / 2) # point N\n"\
           "k = b * sqrt(2) + b # point K\n"\
           "angle = sp.angle(sp.line(n, d), sp.line(m, k))\n"\
           "print(angle.deg)\n"
}}
